ddls:
CREATE TABLE "disability_statistics" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the state */,
  "district_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the district */,
  "tehsil_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the tehsil */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the area */,
  "total_disabled_population" INTEGER /* Total disabled population in the area */,
  "total_males" INTEGER /* Total number of disabled males */,
  "total_females" INTEGER /* Total number of disabled females */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group entry */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistics entry */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group category (e.g., 0-4, 5-9) */,
  "total_disabled_population" INTEGER /* Total number of disabled persons in the age group */,
  "disabled_males" INTEGER /* Total number of disabled males in the age group */,
  "disabled_females" INTEGER /* Total number of disabled females in the age group */,
  "percentage_of_total" TEXT /* Percentage of this age group within the total disabled population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_groups_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES disability_statistics ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disability_types" (
  "disability_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disability type entry */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistics entry */,
  "disability_type" TEXT /* Type of disability (e.g., In seeing, In speech) */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total number of persons with this type of disability */,
  "males" INTEGER /* Total number of males with this type of disability */,
  "females" INTEGER /* Total number of females with this type of disability */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the disability */,
  "percentage_of_total" TEXT /* Percentage of this disability type within the total disabled population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disability_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disability_types_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES disability_statistics ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_distribution" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender entry */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistics entry */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender category (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "total_disabled_population" INTEGER /* Total number of disabled persons of this gender */,
  "males" INTEGER /* Total number of disabled males */,
  "females" INTEGER /* Total number of disabled females */,
  "percentage_of_total" TEXT /* Percentage of this gender within the total disabled population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_distribution_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES disability_statistics ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the state */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "tehsils" (
  "tehsil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tehsil */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "tehsil_name" TEXT /* Name of the tehsil */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the tehsil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tehsil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tehsils_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_logs" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistics entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES disability_statistics ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Data Analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistics entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
